data.description:
Write a comprehensive end-to-end test suite that validates Loom-backed prompt resolution across multiple scenarios.

Tests must cover:
1. Default shipped workflow uses Loom-defined prompts (not static fallbacks)
2. Claim output is rendered from Loom-defined prompts
3. Profile-specific output customization affects rendered prompts
4. Multiple installed workflows function correctly together

Tests must fail with clear diagnostics if:
- A workflow falls back to static non-Loom prompts (regression detection)
- Profile or workflow output semantics fail to reach rendered claim prompts (regression detection)

To validate rendered output, use Playwright MCP tools (browser_snapshot, browser_evaluate) to confirm UI rendering matches Loom-defined prompts and profile expectations.
